snake gliding through water in a joyful S-curve, swish lines
chick sprinting wings pumping after a streaking green snake
chick + a wool-bodied creature with a CAT FACE (whiskers, feline muzzle) and bird wings, both hands/paws up in a STOP gesture

images.depicts: snake snapping twigs in its coils like castanets, sparks
chick + woolly sheep collapsed panting, snake looping overhead grinning
plain potato on path, snake halted amber eyes crossed, chick + sheep frozen mid-pant
small round fuzzy spider with big eyes hanging on a silk thread
garden snail with spiral shell and eye stalks
graceful white swan gliding on water
a coiled leather whip with red-wrapped handle (near-identical to W32's whip.png)

generate (no standalone snake.png exists anywhere to anchor the debut greeting)

generate.line: book:1 'A Snake!' CAST DEBUT + sound-song 'Hello, Snake! sss…' + cards/bingo/matching base asset (CRITICAL — file entirely absent)
generate.mj_prompt: a friendly emerald-green garden snake with large gentle amber eyes zipping forward in mid-motion, a happy green blur, ultra-realistic photograph, single subject centered, dramatic spotlight on deep forest-green backdrop, soft shadows, cinematic, slightly whimsical --ar 3:2 --style raw

line_map.line: Stop, Snake, stop! Snake can not stop! (hook, x2)
Snake can spin! Snake can skip! Snake can swim in a swish!
Snap! Snap! (clap! clap!) Snake can not stop! Spin and skip and swim!

line_map.line: Outro: Snake… stop… A potato?! (POTATO!) Snake can stop at a potato!
